visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white safety hard hat and a high-visibility yellow reflective vest over a dark shirt, is filmed in a selfie-style shot. She is in a large, modern indoor hall with polished floors and a grid of ceiling lights. (2) She walks through the space, passing a large vibrant digital screen displaying cartoonish, colorful animations. The camera moves with her, showing a transition into a hallway area with white walls and some construction barriers. (3) She turns to face the camera, smiling broadly and giving two thumbs-up. A small white circular sticker is on her left cheek. (4) A graphic overlay appears briefly on a black background, showing a cartoon girl with blue tears and a big smile. (5) The woman returns to the screen, standing in front of a colorful wall mural. She uses wide hand gestures, waving her hands to emphasize her points as she speaks directly to the camera. (6) She concludes by pointing toward the camera with a playful, smiling expression before walking away, with the camera capturing a side view of her leaving.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 老闆娘! (2) [Subtitle]: 四週年不錯欸. (3) [Variety]: 驕傲的表情. [Subtitle]: 四週年. (4) [Subtitle]: 可以問你一個問題嗎. [Variety]: 抖抖抖. (5) [Subtitle]: 好啊. (6) [Subtitle]: ははベビー是什麼意思. (7) [Subtitle]: 我是幫別人問啦. [Subtitle]: 知道底下留言「我早就知道」. (8) [Subtitle]: はは（日文）就是媽媽的意思. (9) [Subtitle]: ベビー（日文）就是寶貝的意思. (10) [Variety]: * 含義. [Subtitle]: 就是小朋友的意思. (11) [Subtitle]: 所以ははベビー就是. (12) [Subtitle]: 媽媽幫小孩選他覺得最好的東西的意思. (13) [Variety]: 太溫馨了吧! (14) [Variety]: 驕傲離場.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 person holding the camera/asking questions, 2 distant figures walking in the background hall.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white hard hat with a circular logo, a yellow reflective safety vest over a green top, and a white circular patch on her left cheek.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A spacious modern hall with reflective floors, a large digital animation screen, and a hallway with white walls and colorful wall murals.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Traditional Chinese with clear articulation. A very faint ambient room tone is present. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition. An upbeat, major-mode electronic pop track with a steady kick drum and bright synthesizer leads fades in. (3) A second female voice off-camera asks a question. The main speaker responds with a friendly, rising intonation. A cartoon 'bubble' pop sound effect occurs simultaneously with a graphic display. (4) The main speaker explains the meaning of words with high vocal arousal and positive valence. The music rhythmically supports her speech pace. (5) A bright 'ding' chime sounds as the speaker emphasizes a point. The track concludes with a short musical stinger as the vocals end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to promote and explain the meaning behind the brand 'Haha Baby' during its 4th-anniversary celebration. By answering a commonly asked question about the brand name's origin (Mother + Baby), the creator establishes a warm, family-oriented brand identity and builds emotional rapport with the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names and explains the brand philosophy, features brand logos, and celebrates a brand milestone (4th anniversary).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles, including variety-show captions and cute sound effects, to maintain a high-energy and approachable feel for brand promotion.
